news.title:
Schneider Electric Infrastructure Ltd received a 70 ESG rating for FY24-25 by NSE Sustainability Ratings.
The 'Aspiring' category ESG rating was based on disclosures and publicly available data.
news.summary:
Schneider Electric Infrastructure Ltd received a 70 ESG rating for FY24-25 by NSE Sustainability Ratings.
The 'Aspiring' category ESG rating was based on disclosures and publicly available data.

news.title:
Schneider Electric Infrastructure released Q3 FY26 results, highlighting growth in data centers and clean energy.
Secured major orders in transformers, semiconductors, utilities, and recognized for CSR and skill development efforts.
news.summary:
Schneider Electric Infrastructure released Q3 FY26 results, highlighting growth in data centers and clean energy.
Secured major orders in transformers, semiconductors, utilities, and recognized for CSR and skill development efforts.

news.title:
Coal India & Biocon reported mixed results; Coal India's profit beat estimates while Biocon's net profit rose YoY despite missing estimates.
IRCTC, Indian Hotels, and Engineers India posted strong revenue/profit growth, while Schneider Electric & Petronet LNG showed steady performance.
news.summary:
Coal India & Biocon reported mixed results; Coal India's profit beat estimates while Biocon's net profit rose YoY despite missing estimates.
IRCTC, Indian Hotels, and Engineers India posted strong revenue/profit growth, while Schneider Electric & Petronet LNG showed steady performance.

news.title:
Schneider Electric's Q3 FY26 revenue rose 20.1% YoY to ₹1,029.2 Cr.
Orders grew 60.7% YoY to ₹908.7 Cr; PBT fell 11.5% due to gratuity liabilities.
news.summary:
Schneider Electric's Q3 FY26 revenue rose 20.1% YoY to ₹1,029.2 Cr.
Orders grew 60.7% YoY to ₹908.7 Cr; PBT fell 11.5% due to gratuity liabilities.

news.title:
Schneider Electric Infrastructure's board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.
Net profit for the period was Rs. 9,703 lakh, with EPS at Rs. 4.06. Limited Review Report showed no material misstatements.
news.summary:
Schneider Electric Infrastructure's board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.
Net profit for the period was Rs. 9,703 lakh, with EPS at Rs. 4.06. Limited Review Report showed no material misstatements.

news.title:
Schneider Electric received an income tax demand of INR 171.2 Cr for FY22-23.
Appeal filed with ITAT; no significant financial impact expected as litigation continues.
news.summary:
Schneider Electric received an income tax demand of INR 171.2 Cr for FY22-23.
Appeal filed with ITAT; no significant financial impact expected as litigation continues.

news.title:
Schneider Electric Infrastructure Ltd's board meeting is set for Feb 12, 2026, to review Q3 and nine-month results.
Meeting will also include consideration of the Limited Review Report and other business matters.
news.summary:
Schneider Electric Infrastructure Ltd's board meeting is set for Feb 12, 2026, to review Q3 and nine-month results.
Meeting will also include consideration of the Limited Review Report and other business matters.

news.title:
Schneider Electric Infrastructure Ltd schedules one-on-one investor/analyst meets in Mumbai on Jan 7 and 9, 2026.
No unpublished price-sensitive information will be shared; details available on the company's website.
news.summary:
Schneider Electric Infrastructure Ltd schedules one-on-one investor/analyst meets in Mumbai on Jan 7 and 9, 2026.
No unpublished price-sensitive information will be shared; details available on the company's website.

news.title:
Schneider Electric faces INR 3.57 crore demand for excess ITC claimed in FY22.
The company is evaluating legal options; no material financial or operational impact.
news.summary:
Schneider Electric faces INR 3.57 crore demand for excess ITC claimed in FY22.
The company is evaluating legal options; no material financial or operational impact.

news.title:
CCI approves Schneider Electric SE's stake acquisition in SEJV2 from Macritchie Investments.
This move aims to bolster Schneider Electric's market position in India.
news.summary:
CCI approves Schneider Electric SE's stake acquisition in SEJV2 from Macritchie Investments.
This move aims to bolster Schneider Electric's market position in India.

news.title:
Schneider Electric Infra's appeal confirms tax demand of INR 92.76 crore for FY 2019-20.
Penalty amount may require correction; no material impact on financials or operations expected.
news.summary:
Schneider Electric Infra's appeal confirms tax demand of INR 92.76 crore for FY 2019-20.
Penalty amount may require correction; no material impact on financials or operations expected.

news.title:
Schneider Electric received a tax demand for wrongful ITC claims in FY18-19, 21-22, 22-23.
Demand and penalty total Rs 28.1 lakh each; company reviewing legal options.
news.summary:
Schneider Electric received a tax demand for wrongful ITC claims in FY18-19, 21-22, 22-23.
Demand and penalty total Rs 28.1 lakh each; company reviewing legal options.

news.title:
Schneider Electric Infrastructure Ltd received a demand order from CGST for short tax payment on imported services.
Liability totals INR 1.86 Cr for 2018-2021; no material financial or operational impact expected.
news.summary:
Schneider Electric Infrastructure Ltd received a demand order from CGST for short tax payment on imported services.
Liability totals INR 1.86 Cr for 2018-2021; no material financial or operational impact expected.

news.title:
Schneider Electric Infrastructure reports Q2 H1 FY26 results; order inflow up 28%, sales up 6.6%.
Company wins Golden Peacock Award for ESG; positive outlook on Power, Grid, Data Centers, Renewables, Mobility.
news.summary:
Schneider Electric Infrastructure reports Q2 H1 FY26 results; order inflow up 28%, sales up 6.6%.
Company wins Golden Peacock Award for ESG; positive outlook on Power, Grid, Data Centers, Renewables, Mobility.

news.title:
Goldman Sachs notes Schneider Electric's orders rose 47% with a 39% margin.
Buy rating retained with a target price of ₹950.
news.summary:
Goldman Sachs notes Schneider Electric's orders rose 47% with a 39% margin.
Buy rating retained with a target price of ₹950.

news.title:
Nifty closed 0.07% lower at 25,492.3; Sensex fell 0.11% to 83,216.3. Shriram Finance, Bajaj Finance gained; Bharti Airtel, Tata Consumer lost.
SCHNEIDER Electric, Nykaa, NALCO, and Ratnamani Metals showed mixed Q2 results; NALCO announced Rs 4/share interim dividend with Nov. 14 record date.
news.summary:
Nifty closed 0.07% lower at 25,492.3; Sensex fell 0.11% to 83,216.3. Shriram Finance, Bajaj Finance gained; Bharti Airtel, Tata Consumer lost.
SCHNEIDER Electric, Nykaa, NALCO, and Ratnamani Metals showed mixed Q2 results; NALCO announced Rs 4/share interim dividend with Nov. 14 record date.

news.title:
Schneider Electric Infra reported Q2 2026 earnings in Nov 2025 call hosted by Elara.
The call covered financial performance, management commentary, and future outlook.
news.summary:
Schneider Electric Infra reported Q2 2026 earnings in Nov 2025 call hosted by Elara.
The call covered financial performance, management commentary, and future outlook.

news.title:
Schneider Electric Infra Q2 EBITDA rose to 838M INR from 742M YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 12.9% vs 12.37% YoY.
news.summary:
Schneider Electric Infra Q2 EBITDA rose to 838M INR from 742M YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 12.9% vs 12.37% YoY.

news.title:
Schneider Electric announces Namrata Kaul ends term as Independent Director.
Pravin Kumar Purang appointed as new Chairperson of Schneider Electric Infrastructure Ltd.
news.summary:
Schneider Electric announces Namrata Kaul ends term as Independent Director.
Pravin Kumar Purang appointed as new Chairperson of Schneider Electric Infrastructure Ltd.

news.title:
India's $5.4-tn market sees a surge in AI-related investments, with global giants like Google, Microsoft, Amazon, and OpenAI committing billions to build AI infrastructure and data centers.
Local firms like Adani Enterprises, Reliance Industries, Tata Consultancy Services, Blue Star, and ABB India are set to benefit from AI-driven demand for power, cooling, and server solutions.
news.summary:
India's $5.4-tn market sees a surge in AI-related investments, with global giants like Google, Microsoft, Amazon, and OpenAI committing billions to build AI infrastructure and data centers.
Local firms like Adani Enterprises, Reliance Industries, Tata Consultancy Services, Blue Star, and ABB India are set to benefit from AI-driven demand for power, cooling, and server solutions.
